message:
feat(cfm): complete DPOR + concurrency failure injection matrix (ft-e34d9.10.6.2)

Add 15 new tests to concurrency_fault_matrix.rs completing the bead:
- Shutdown drain workload (4 tests) completing the 5x4 core matrix
- Extended fault profiles: backpressure spike, timeout race, partial I/O (5 tests)
- User-facing scenarios: rate-limit wait, reconnect storm, remote command retry,
  startup under degraded I/O, cancellation storm (5 tests plus CFM-7 verification)
- Structured telemetry output (CfmTestResult) for CI archival and failure trace replay
- Full 5x7 telemetry matrix (#[ignore] for CI-friendly slicing)
- run_matrix_cell_with_telemetry helper for machine-readable JSON output

Also fix mcp.rs/mcp_tools.rs import issues: move test-gated mcp_error imports
to unconditional scope since mcp_tools.rs uses them in non-test code; add
missing imports for injection_from_decision, resolve_pane_capabilities, etc.

Total: 35 fast tests + 1 ignored thorough matrix (5 workloads x 7 profiles).
All 35 fast tests pass. No regressions in original 20 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
